name: Slayer Of Terramorphous
description: Bandit class mod for Salvador the Gunzerker. Drops from Terramorphous the Invincible. Built around Locked and Loaded, Quick Draw, Filled to the Brim, Hard to Kill, Incite, Sentry, Ready, Impact, Expertise, Healthy.
notes: Part of a set of Terramorphous-only items. Collecting all of them combines their red text into a short poem.

special.description: At max level, Salvador's Slayer Of Terramorphous grants: - Burn Damage: +37% - Ignite Chance: +37% - Health: +1,101,229
